exchanges.text: [PLACEHOLDER reply 1 — framing: 3–4 sentences. Who you are in your own words, end with a hook that invites the next question. Tone: warm, declarative.]
what do you actually do day-to-day?
[PLACEHOLDER reply 2 — the work: 3–4 sentences. Concrete verbs, name the collaborators you partner with. Avoid a brand list here — that has its own intent.]
what's it like working with you?
[PLACEHOLDER reply 3 — collaboration: 3–5 sentences. How you give feedback, where you push, where you defer. Specific, not aspirational.]
why is the writing shelf so empty?
[PLACEHOLDER reply 4 — self-editing posture: 2–3 sentences. The /writing page joke, plus the real reason. Ends with 'ask me for a sample.']
[PLACEHOLDER reply 5 — close + email CTA: 2–3 sentences. Availability, how to reach you, why email beats a form. End with the mailto link in plain text — the UI will wire it.]
